_doc: Innistrad: Double Feature (DBL, 2022-01-28). Sold as a SINGLE booster type (a Draft Booster meant for both drafting and collecting) — no separate Collector/Play product — so authoritative:true offers exactly this one pack (mapped to 'draft') and hides the generic-collector fallback. Per Wizards' product overview, each 15-card pack = 4 MID commons + 4 VOW commons + 2 MID uncommons + 2 VOW uncommons + 1 MID rare/mythic + 1 VOW rare/mythic + 1 silver-screen foil (any rarity); every card exists as a silver-screen B&W printing in the DBL set. Modelled against the DBL pool; the per-set MID/VOW split is cosmetic here since DBL holds both.

draft.tagline: 8 commons · 4 uncommons · 2 rare/mythic (MID + VOW) · 1 silver-screen foil
